zh.lifeSummary: 當Sancho Garcés於1039年出生在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納時，他的父親García Sánchez III28歲，母親Estefania de Foix-Couserans22歲。他於1057年之前與Constanza Sánchez de Marañón結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1083年1月6日在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩魯埃達 德 加洛享年44歲，埋葬在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉。

nameMeanings.name: Garcés
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jorge, Carlos, Juan, Jose, Manuel, Cesar, Rafael, Luis, Fernando, Gustavo, Javier, Mario.  Portuguese Albeiro, Paulo.
Spanish; Catalan (Garcés); Portuguese (Garcês): patronymic from the personal name García (see Garcia ).

variants.name: Garcia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Carlos, Luis, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Mario, Raul, Roberto, Ramon, Rafael.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Joao, Paulo, Catarina, Albeiro, Ligia, Godofredo, Lidio, Wenseslao, Adao, Afonso.

Spanish (García) and Portuguese: from a medieval personal name of uncertain origin. It is normally found in medieval records in the Latin form Garsea, and may well be of pre-Roman origin, perhaps akin to Basque (h)artz ‘bear’. This is the most common surname in Spain and also one of the most common surnames elsewhere in Spanish-speaking world. In the US, where it is also found among Native Americans (mainly Pueblos in NM), it is the sixth most frequent surname. Compare De Garcia .

nameMeanings.name: Sancho
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, perhaps from Latin sanctus ‘holy’. It will always be associated with Sancho Panza , Don Quixote's companion.

en.lifeSummary: When Sancho Garcés was born in 1039, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain, his father, García Sánchez III, was 28 and his mother, Estefania de Foix-Couserans, was 22. He married Constanza Sánchez de Marañón before 1057. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 6 January 1083, in Rueda de Jalón, Zaragoza, Aragón, Spain, at the age of 44, and was buried in Nájera, La Rioja, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sancho Garcés est né en 1039, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne, son père, García Sánchez III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Estefania de Foix-Couserans, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Constanza Sánchez de Marañón avant 1057. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1083, à Rueda de Jalón, Zaragoza, Aragón, Espagne, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Nájera, La Rioja, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sancho Garcés 1039 in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater García Sánchez III 28 und seine Mutter Estefania de Foix-Couserans 22. Er hat vor 1057 Constanza Sánchez de Marañón geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. Januar 1083 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Rueda de Jalón, Zaragoza, Aragón, Spanien und wurde in Nájera, La Rioja, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sancho Garcés è nato il nel 1039 nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna, il suo padre, García Sánchez III, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Estefania de Foix-Couserans, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Constanza Sánchez de Marañón prima del 1057. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 gennaio 1083, nel Rueda de Jalón, Zaragoza, Aragón, Spagna, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Nájera, La Rioja, Spagna.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sancho Garcés nasceu em 1039, em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha, seu pai, García Sánchez III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Estefania de Foix-Couserans, tinha 22 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sancho Garcés родился в 1039 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания, его отцу по имени García Sánchez III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Estefania de Foix-Couserans, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Constanza Sánchez de Marañón перед 1057 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 января 1083 г. в местности руеда де джалoн, зарагоза, арагoн, Испания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности нaджира, ла риоджа, Испания.
